name: Password (JSON Field)
summary: Detects passwords in JSON / structured contexts (e.g., "password": "xyz")
description: Sibling rule to credentials.password_context. Detects password values inside JSON-shaped key/value pairs including variants like "password", "passwd", "pwd", "passcode", "internPassword", "userPassword". The prose rule's regex requires unquoted values and misses JSON entirely; this rule fills that gap. Requires at least 4 characters in the captured value.

effect.message: Password redacted — detected inside JSON key/value pair
